description:
The Open Source Alternative To Notion.

AppFlowy is an open source alternative to Notion.
You are in charge of your data and customizations.
Version 0.12.2 – 05/06/2026
Desktop
New Features
- Revamped Tab Management: Easier ways to manage tabs with shortcuts
- Inline Comments in Database Rows: Keep team discussions contextual with granular comment threads right inside your row pages.
- Kanban Board Column Coloring: Add visual structure to your project pipelines by customizing individual column colors.
Bug Fixes
- Fixed page mentions sometimes resolving to the wrong ancestor id.
- Fixed cursor position not being preserved across remote document sync.
- Fixed copying and pasting content that contains files.
- Fixed duplicate child view keys that could crash the sidebar.
Mobile
New Features
- Inline Comments in Database Rows: Keep team discussions contextual with granular comment threads right inside your row pages.
- Kanban Board Column Coloring: Add visual structure to your project pipelines by customizing individual column colors.
Bug Fixes
- Fixed page mentions sometimes resolving to the wrong ancestor id.
- Fixed cursor position not being preserved across remote document sync.
